_meta.rules: NEVER remove or edit existing features. Only update 'passes' after independent QA verification. Add new features at the end. Each feature has a 'project' field indicating which repo it belongs to. The 'risk' field is required for v3 features. The 'plan' field is required for v3 features. Existing features without risk/plan are treated as risk:medium, plan:[]. v4 adds: blocked_by (array of feature IDs or 'manual:description'), last_attempted (ISO-8601), attempt_count (integer), status (open|in-progress|blocked|completed|abandoned). Existing features without these fields are treated as: blocked_by=[], last_attempted=null, attempt_count=0, status=open.

features.description: Example feature showing all v4 fields.
